name: CrimeBot 2: Detective Mystery Games
short_description: A serial killer is on the loose. Only you can stop him! In CrimeBot 2, you analyze crime scenes, interrogate suspects, and connect the clues to solve cold cases around the world. The truth is hidden in the details.
detailed_description:
Step into the world of CrimeBot 2: the ultimate detective, investigation, and mystery experience where every crime hides a shocking truth.

In this detective simulator, every decision, every clue, and every piece of evidence can change the outcome of your investigation. Analyze realistic crime scenes, interrogate suspects, and dive into case files full of photos, reports, and testimonies. Every detail matters in this thriller-inspired visual novel where your detective intuition is the only weapon against unsolved mysteries.

🎮 Two Game Modes

  • 🎯 Quick Match – Short but intense mystery investigations, perfect for sharpening your detective skills against unpredictable crimes.

  • 📖 Story Mode – Travel across the world through intricate crime cases, facing deep thriller narratives, shocking plot twists, and immersive visual novel storytelling that keep every mystery investigation fresh and challenging.

💼 Key Features

  • A realistic detective simulator blending crime, mystery, and thriller elements.

  • Complex investigations inspired by unsolved real-life crimes and cold cases.

  • Detailed case files with evidence, photographs, and suspects to fuel your visual novel thriller experience.

  • Interrogate suspects: choose your words carefully to incriminate the guilty or free the innocent.

  • Branching choices that shape each investigation and lead to multiple outcomes.

  • A polished, immersive, ad-free interface created for true fans of crime and mystery games.

🧠 Made by two passionate indie developers, pouring love and countless coffees into every detail of this detective investigation thriller visual novel.

💌 Your feedback is essential — every review, suggestion, or message helps us improve and expand the world of CrimeBot 2.

👉 Download CrimeBot 2 now and prove you have the sharp mind, courage, and intuition to solve the most intricate crimes, mysteries, and investigations in the world of thriller detective visual novels.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Indonesian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Vietnamese
